meta.name: Review and Community Monitor
meta.description: Collect product reviews and community discussions, classify issues, detect emerging topics, and notify the team about important changes.

parameters.content:
## 08 — Review and Community Monitor

**Configure RSS/API sources in the Code node 'Load Sources'.**

Supported sources:
- App Store / Google Play RSS
- Product Hunt discussions (RSS)
- Reddit posts (RSS)
- G2 / Trustpilot (manual export JSON)
- Any webhook with { text, source, url } payload

**Required:** OpenAI API credential
**Schedule:** Every 12 hours by default
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Classify product reviews and community posts. Return JSON only.
